She looks down and releases her grip so that she lands on the back of Shang causing the two of them to fall to the ground. Shan-Yu's sword follows and lands on the ground near by]

speaker: Mushu
text: Ah ha ha ha ha. You are a lucky bug.
parenthetical: [landing and flying backwards on his butt a couple of times pointing at the fireworks] | [Mushu's catches Cri-Kee with antenna on fire as Cri-Kee falls toward him] | [to Cri-Kee] | [Mushu pinches out the fire on Cri-Kee's antenna]

speaker: Chi Fu
text: That was a deliberate attempt on my life. Where is she? Now she's done it. What a mess. Stand aside, that creature's not worth protecting.
parenthetical: [walking down the stairs in a tattered outfit and slightly burned] | [Shang and troops push Mulan behind them to protect her] | [to Shang]

speaker: Shang
text: She's a hero.
parenthetical: [in Chi Fu's face]

speaker: Chi Fu
text: 'Tis a woman. She will never be worth anything.

speaker: Shang
text: Listen, you pompous--
parenthetical: [grabbing Chi Fu by the shirt collar]

speaker: Emperor
text: That is enough!
parenthetical: [walking down the steps]

speaker: Shang
text: Your Majesty, I can explain.
parenthetical: [The Emperor motions for Shang to stand aside. Shang and his men part giving the Emperor a clear path to Mulan. Mulan steps forward and bows before the Emperor. Chi Fu with a sinister look waits to write down the words of the Emperor]

speaker: Emperor
text: I've heard a great deal about you, Fa Mulan. You stole your father's armor, ran away from home, impersonated a soldier, deceived your commanding officer, dishonored the Chinese army, destroyed my palace, AND...you have saved us all.
parenthetical: [the Emperor bows to Mulan] | [Chi Fu looks at the Emperor actions astonishingly then immediately falls prostrate before Mulan. Shang, Yao, Ling, and Chien-Po follow suit. Mulan looks up then turns around hardly believing what she sees as the entire Chinese population within the palace grounds fall prostrate on the ground in a wave like pattern, bowing to her. Khan bows with Mushu and Cri-Kee on his back]

speaker: Mushu
text: My little baby's all grown up and savin' China. You have a tissue?
parenthetical: [to Cri-Kee]

speaker: Emperor
text: Chi Fu,

speaker: Chi Fu
text: Your Excellency?

speaker: Emperor
text: See to it that this woman is made a member of my council.

speaker: Chi Fu
text: A member of your coun... what? But there are no council positions open, your Majesty.
parenthetical: [muttering to himself] | [realizing what the Emperor has said] | [stutters]

speaker: Emperor
text: Very well then, you can have his job.
parenthetical: [to Mulan] | [pointing out Chi Fu]

speaker: Chi Fu
text: What?...My...
parenthetical: [wobbling to and fro] | [faints]

speaker: Mulan
text: With all due respect, your Excellency. I have been away from home long enough.
parenthetical: [smiles big then turns to the Emperor and bows]

speaker: Emperor
text: Then take this, so your family will know what you have done for me. And this so the world will know what you have done for China.
parenthetical: [taking off his pendant] | [handing her the sword of Shan-Yu]

speaker: Yao
text: Is she allowed to do that?
parenthetical: [Shang, Ling, and Chien-Po shrug] | [Mulan walks away from the Emperor and is embraced by Yao and Ling. Chien-Po comes up and lifts all three of them off the ground in a big bear hug. Chien-Po lets them all back to the ground again. Mulan walks toward Shang and stops in front of him. As Shang begins to speak Mulan starts to smile anticipating something good]

speaker: Shang
text: Um... You... You fight good.
parenthetical: [Mulan grins] | [Mulan smiles]

speaker: Mulan
text: Oh, thank you.
parenthetical: [smile turning into disappointment] | [Mulan walks toward Khan]

speaker: Shang
text: : Hmm.
parenthetical: [turning toward Mulan and grunts with disappointment in himself]

speaker: Emperor
text: The flower that blooms in adversity is the most rare and beautiful of all.
parenthetical: [to Shang]

speaker: Shang
text: Sir?
parenthetical: [dumbfounded]

speaker: Emperor
text: You don't meet a girl like that ev'ry dynasty.
parenthetical: [The emperor puts on his hat and walks back up the steps to his palace]

speaker: Fa Zhou
text: Mulan.
parenthetical: [Mulan quickly moves in front of her father and kneels causing him to sit back down]

speaker: Mulan
text: Father, I brought you the sword of Shan-Yu and the crest of the Emperor. They're gifts to honor the Fa Family.
parenthetical: [hands the sword to Fa Zhou] | [hands the crest to Fa Zhou] | [with head bowed] | [Fa Zhou takes the gifts and throws them down to the ground beside him to the surprise of Mulan. He bends down and holds her arms outstretched]

speaker: Fa Zhou
text: The greatest gift and honor, is having you for a daughter. I've missed you so.
parenthetical: [Fa Zhou wipes away Mulan's tear then hugs Mulan] | [Fa li and Grandma Fa watch from the doorway]

speaker: Fa Li
text: Ahhhhh
parenthetical: [sighing]

speaker: Grandma Fa
text: Great, she brings home a sword. If you ask me she should have brought home a ma--
parenthetical: [leaving her mouth open when she sees Shang]

speaker: Shang
text: Excuse me, does Fa Mulan live here?
parenthetical: [just arriving] | [Grandma Fa's mouth stays open as she and Fa Li point toward Mulan's position. Shang walks toward Mulan and Fa Zhou]

speaker: Grandma Fa
text: Woo, sign me up for the next war.

speaker: Shang
text: Honorable Fa Zhou I--Mulan Uh...Uh...You forgot your helmet. Ah but well, actually it's your helmet, isn't it?... I mean...
parenthetical: [bows before Fa Zhou and speaks confidently] | [Mulan steps up. Shang sees her and speaks insecurely] | [handing the helmet toward Fa Zhou] | [Fa Zhou motions with his head for Mulan to take over. Mulan holds the helmet Shang offers]

speaker: Mulan
text: Would you like to stay for dinner?

speaker: Grandma Fa
text: Would you like to stay forever?
parenthetical: [speaking from stage right] | [Mulan shakes her head with a smile at Grandma Fa's statement]

speaker: Shang
text: Dinner would be great.
parenthetical: [reassuredly to Mulan]

text: C'mon, who did a good job? C'mon, tell me who did a good job.

text: Yeeeeeahhhhhhh.
